name: Mid-Sprint Issue Management with Projects
prompt: It's mid-sprint and two things happened in my GitHub Project: (1) an urgent production bug came in — I need to add it to the current Sprint iteration without killing our sprint goal, and (2) ticket AUTH-42 has been blocked for 2 days, blocked by AUTH-38 which was just deployed. Show me how to handle both situations in the Scrum Board project for mycompany/auth-service.

assertions.text: Shows how to create the urgent bug ticket with proper labels
Shows how to add the issue to the Scrum Board project using gh project item-add
Shows how to set the Sprint field to current iteration
Mentions checking sprint capacity or removing a lower-priority ticket to compensate
Shows how to remove the blocker by updating Status field from Blocked to Ready
Uses gh CLI commands, not instructions to use the GitHub UI
References Status field values (Backlog, Ready, In Progress, Blocked, Review, Done)
